name: Farmers State Bank
description_short: Community bank in Mountain City, TN offering personal and business checking, savings, loans, and online banking services across three locations.
description_long:
Farmers State Bank is a community-focused bank headquartered in Mountain City, Tennessee, serving the region through three physical locations. The bank has established itself as a local financial institution with a commitment to community involvement and accessibility. Founded with roots in the local agricultural community, FSB has evolved to serve both personal and business banking needs across multiple customer segments.

The bank offers comprehensive personal banking services including checking and savings accounts, long-term savings products, personal loans, home loans, and vehicle loans. For business customers, FSB provides business checking and savings accounts, agriculture loans, commercial loans, and small business lending. All customers have access to online and mobile banking platforms, bill pay services, debit cards, safe deposit boxes, wire services, and telephone banking. The bank also provides eStatements and loan calculators to help customers manage their finances.

Farmers State Bank distinguishes itself through its agricultural lending expertise and local community focus. The bank actively promotes community involvement and maintains accessible customer service through multiple channels—including phone support at (423) 727-8121. Their mobile banking app is available on both iOS and Android, and they emphasize financial literacy and community engagement through social media presence on Facebook and Instagram.

As a traditional community bank, FSB is best suited for customers who prioritize local relationships and personalized service. However, the website provides limited information about specific product features, rates, terms, or competitive advantages. The bank serves primarily the Mountain City area and may have geographic limitations for broader customer bases seeking national banking options. Customers should contact the bank directly for details on rates, fees, and specific loan terms. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: Three physical branch locations in the Mountain City area for in-person service
Agricultural lending specialization with dedicated agriculture loan products
Multiple account types (checking, savings, long-term savings) for personal flexibility
Comprehensive business banking services including agriculture, commercial, and small business loans
Mobile banking app available on both iOS and Android platforms
Free eStatements service reducing paper waste and increasing accessibility
Multiple service channels: online, mobile, telephone, and in-person banking
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Mountain City, TN area with only three branch locations
Website lacks specific information on interest rates, APRs, and fees for products
No transparent disclosure of loan terms, minimum balances, or qualification requirements on public website
Limited information about competitive advantages or product differentiation compared to regional/national banks
No mention of specialty products like credit cards, investment services, or wealth management

contact.address: 100 W Main St, Mountain City, TN 37683

best_for: Local Mountain City, TN residents seeking community-focused banking relationships
Agricultural businesses and farmers needing specialized agricultural lending
Small business owners and commercial enterprises in the Johnson County area
Customers preferring personal relationships with local bank representatives over purely digital banking
diagnosis: Farmers State Bank is best for individuals and businesses in the Mountain City, TN area seeking traditional community banking with agricultural lending expertise and personalized local service. The primary caveat is limited geographic availability and lack of transparent pricing information on their public website—customers must contact the bank directly for rates, fees, and specific product terms.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 100 W Main St, Mountain City, TN 37683
